## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Language Pack (new or updated)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npx tsc -b` passes
- [ ] `npx vitest run` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] If pack changes: `npm run validate-pack -- --pack src/packs/<name>` passes
- [ ] Core changes do not reference any specific language (language-agnostic rule)
- [ ] UI strings use `useTranslation()`, not hardcoded text
